prompt_md: Arrange the six steps of a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline into the correct end-to-end order. Remember: the indexing steps must be done before any question can be answered, and at query time you must retrieve relevant context before the model generates its answer.

items: Augment the prompt by inserting the retrieved chunks as context
Chunk the source documents into smaller passages
Generate the final answer from the augmented prompt
Embed each chunk into a vector
Embed the user's question and retrieve the top-k most similar chunks
Store the chunk vectors in a vector index
